positive: A stylized and whimsical depiction of a friendly forest gnome gathering luminous glowing mushrooms in a bioluminescent woodland setting. The gnome should have a cute, welcoming silhouette, wearing a textured tweed vest and carrying a woven basket. Surround the central figure with stylized flora, moss, and glowing mushrooms in varying shades of cyan, emerald green, and soft lavender. Emphasize high contrast between the deep forest shadows and the bright, ethereal glow of the mushrooms. The style must be flat, illustrative vector art mixed with detailed digital painting elements, suitable for screen printing on apparel. Composition should be centered and perfectly balanced, with clean lines and crisp edges. Studio lighting, maximalist but organized.
negative: blurry, low detail, ugly, watermark, logo, text, signatures, copyright, messy, artifacts, out of frame, bad anatomy, extra limbs, noisy, grainy, photograph, realistic, photo-realistic
